hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ -z "$f" ]]; then exit 0; fi; out=""; if [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && [[ "$f" == */backend/* ]]; then ruff="backend/.venv/bin/ruff"; if [ -x "$ruff" ]; then out=$("$ruff" check "$f" 2>&1) || true; fi; elif [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] && [[ "$f" == */frontend/* ]]; then eslint="frontend/node_modules/.bin/eslint"; if [ -x "$eslint" ]; then out=$("$eslint" "$f" 2>&1) || true; fi; fi; if [[ -n "$out" ]]; then jq -n --arg o "$out" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":$o}}'; fi
